bodyHtml:
Completed Cards

既有研究记录

  • Analyst: 首席经济学家
  • Stance: initial
  • Topic: 美国7月FOMC前瞻：通胀粘性与就业降温的拉扯
  • Question: 截至2026-07-12，6月就业降温是否足以抵消通胀和SEP的鹰派信号，从而让市场在7月28-29日FOMC会议前重新定价宽松？
  • Summary: 截至2026-07-12，6月非农降温降低了立即加息概率，但不足以恢复宽松偏向。Fed在6月维持3.50%-3.75%利率区间，SEP上修2026年通胀和年末利率预测；5月PCE与CPI仍显著高于2%目标。基准判断是7月按兵不动但措辞偏鹰，组合上不宜把就业报告视为加久期绿灯。
  • Handoff: asset-allocator | 鹰派按兵不动情景下的跨资产配置 | 如果7月FOMC前景是“鹰派按兵不动”而非宽松转向，那么在2026年7月14日CPI和2026年7月28-29日FOMC窗口前，一个均衡组合应更偏好现金、短久期债券、曲线陡峭化、商品对冲，还是质量型股票？

既有研究记录

  • Analyst: 首席策略师
  • Stance: synthesize
  • Topic: 鹰派按兵不动情景下，均衡组合的核心不是全面避险，而是用前端票息和现金等待CPI/FOMC确认，并以曲线陡峭化和定向通胀对冲管理尾部风险。
  • Question: Investigate the topic "鹰派按兵不动情景下，均衡组合的核心不是全面避险，而是用前端票息和现金等待CPI/FOMC确认，并以曲线陡峭化和定向通胀对冲管理尾部风险。" and make the strongest evidence-based judgment you can.
  • Summary: 截至2026-07-12，本报告片综合并支持研究记录01的“7月鹰派按兵不动”判断。组合不应抢跑宽松转向，应首先偏好短久期国债/票据和现金，其次用2s10s/2s30s陡峭化表达政策风险，再配置适度商品对冲和防守质量型股票。模型权重为30%短久期、20%现金、10%曲线陡峭化风险预算、10%商品对冲、30%质量型股票。WTI近期回落削弱全面商品超配，但高实际利率和粘性PCE仍压制长久期成长。
  • Handoff: fx-strategist | 鹰派Fed与USD/CNY压力下的A股风格轮动 | 在2026年7月28-29日FOMC会议前，鹰派按兵不动和仍具限制性的美国实际利率，是否会传导为USD/CNY压力、外资流向风险和A股质量红利相对成长风格的再定价？

既有研究记录

  • Analyst: 全球宏观分析师
  • Stance: synthesize
  • Topic: 鹰派按兵不动会维持USD/CNY潜在压力并推动A股质量红利相对成长再定价，但截至2026-07-12尚不足以构成A股整体风险出清信号。
  • Question: Investigate the topic "鹰派按兵不动会维持USD/CNY潜在压力并推动A股质量红利相对成长再定价，但截至2026-07-12尚不足以构成A股整体风险出清信号。" and make the strongest evidence-based judgment you can.
  • Summary: 截至2026-07-12，本报告综合支持前两张研究记录：鹰派Fed和限制性美国实际利率确实会通过中美利差和外资通道压住A股风险偏好，但最新USD/CNY即期、中间价和CFETS篮子尚未确认人民币失序贬值。基准判断是汇率压力可控、外资beta存在选择性脆弱性、A股质量红利相对高久期成长占优，而不是全市场卖出信号。
  • Handoff: ashare-strategist | A股市场结构验证：北向成交、融资余额与质量红利拥挤度 | 在宏观-汇率压力仍可控但利差约束明确的背景下，北向行业成交、融资余额和限售解禁是否支持继续超配质量红利、低配高久期成长？

既有研究记录

  • Analyst: 首席策略师
  • Stance: synthesize
  • Topic: A股市场结构验证：北向成交、融资余额与质量红利拥挤度
  • Question: 在宏观-汇率压力仍可控但利差约束明确的背景下，北向行业成交、融资余额和限售解禁是否支持继续超配质量红利、低配高久期成长？
  • Summary: 微观结构支持继续超配质量红利、低配高久期成长，但超额收益来源需重构。两融余额2026-07-09融资端达29,341.64亿元（年内+16.24%），6月23日首破3万亿元，但杠杆压倒性集中于电子科技（电子6179亿占全市场逾20%，占年内融资增量约66%）——这是成长端的去杠杆脆弱性。红利端40日收益差−14.33%处五年极低分位、股息率5.2–5.65%，是持仓拥挤但价格便宜的套息交易，抱团已出清。7月解禁约2661亿、成长为主（屹唐/华电新能/荣昌逾40%），供给悬崖砸向成长。北向日频数据自2024-08-19停披，须以境内杠杆为高频代理。距2.80万亿触发线缓冲仅约1.2%。
  • Handoff: china-macro | 境内基本面验证：社融/信贷、PPI、工业企业利润与政策取向是否支撑红利盈利韧性优于成长 | 在杠杆压倒性押注科技、红利已是套息交易的结构下，中国自身周期（社融/信贷、PPI、工业企业利润、政策取向）在基本面上是否真正支持红利优于成长，还是该风格倾斜纯属易受国内亲成长政策转向冲击的流动性/持仓产物？

📎 Known facts (逻辑链 KB)

The institute already holds facts on entities in this task — pull the OKF concept doc before researching, and cite [source] verbatim - 红利 — GET /api/chain/export/okf/doc/%E7%BA%A2%E5%88%A9 (17 known facts) - 工业 — GET /api/chain/export/okf/doc/%E5%B7%A5%E4%B8%9A (4 known facts) - 企业 — GET /api/chain/export/okf/doc/%E4%BC%81%E4%B8%9A (1 known facts)

Live investment theses (the institute's house view — build on these, don't re-derive)

th_p_7cee86a1 [proposed] A股下半年‘哑铃型’配置方案：防守转向二/三层红利，成长聚焦高技术硬件

降低长久期拥挤红利（水电/核电），转向煤炭、油气等具备政策托底的第二层红利，成长端聚焦高技术制造。 - 2026-07-10 ✓ Yangtze Power dividend yield at 3.6% vs 1.73% 10Y bond yield - 2026-07-12 ± 长江电力股息率压至 3.6%，相较 10Y 国债 1.73% 的 carry 降至约 187 bp。 - Invalidation triggers: 若中国 10 年期国债收益率跌破 1.65% 或利率冲破 1.90%

th_T05 [revised] 红利防御完整弧线：避风港 → 物理红利 → 拥挤出清（当前处出清段）

红利从 4 月避风港（+7pct 加仓）演化为 5-6 月“物理红利”信仰资产（长江电力锚），至 6 月底拥挤度达 80-88% 分位极值、股息率压至历史低位后进入技术性出清——机构 07-01 已执行换仓。 - ? ± Huichuan Tech 2026Q1 gross margin fell 615bp to 29.08% despite 12.98% YoY revenue growth. - 2024-04-24 ✓ 高股息样本参与意愿（拥挤分位）从 22.15% 升至 48.60%，处于历史前 35% 警戒区。 - Invalidation triggers: 证伪触发（对出清）：资产荒加深（10Y<1.65%）+险资被迫回流可重新抬轿；反向确认：工行破 7.05 加速出清。

th_p_be82232d [proposed] 高股息策略转向分红韧性与现金流久期

高股息配置应从单纯买入收益率转向追求现金分红确定性与低再融资依赖，缩短资产久期。 - 2024-07-12 ✓ 中证红利股息率减中国 10 年期收益率约 3 51 bp - 2026-05-08 ✓ 贵州、云南、天津 2026 H1 合计到期及付息缺口约为 500-950 亿元。 - Invalidation triggers: 中证红利与10年债利差大幅收窄且不再能覆盖信用风险溢价

When your findings bear on a thesis above, CITE its id (e.g. th_T01). If your evidence CONTRADICTS one, say so explicitly with dated numbers — contradictions are more valuable than confirmations.

daoming 33107 0.1 0.3 515408560 433872 s001 S+ 10:41AM 0:02.29 claude -p --dangerously-skip-permissions # Your Role: 全球宏观分析师 (Global Macro Analyst)

Expertise: US/EU/Japan economy, global trade, geopolitical risks

Step −1 — Anchor today's date (BLOCKING — read before anything else)

  • The institute's authoritative work-date for THIS card is 2026-07-12 (Asia/Singapore).
  • Run 系统日期锚 in your shell to confirm. If your shell shows a different date than 2026-07-12, prefer 2026-07-12 — the institute's work-date is canonical.
  • Every "today", "this week", "last week", "上周", "上一交易日", "YTD", "近期", "near-term" reference in your report MUST be relative to 2026-07-12, NOT your training data's idea of "now". Models with earlier knowledge cutoffs frequently hallucinate stale dates here — this anchor is the institute's defense.
  • When you cite a data release (e.g. "BEA 月度 PCE", "OPEC+ 减产协议", "FOMC 利率决议"), use the release's REAL date as it would land relative to 2026-07-12. Do not anchor to a year your training data happens to remember. If you are unsure of an event's actual date, write [日期不明] and move on — never guess.
  • The card title / metadata footer / first paragraph of EACH deliverable file (report.zh.md, report.en.md, meta.json) must visibly carry 2026-07-12 (or the localized equivalent). A report whose footer reads any other year is a hard reject.

Citations (MANDATORY — graded)

  • Every quantitative claim, named fact, specific date, and forward estimate MUST carry an inline source tag immediately after it, e.g. [S1], [S2].
  • End BOTH report files with a ## 资料来源 / Sources section listing each tag as [S1] <publisher>, <title> — <full URL>. Use the real URL you actually consulted (from web_search or a fetched page); never invent, guess, or approximate a link.
  • If you cannot find a credible source for a number, mark it [来源不明] (source unknown) and treat it as low-confidence — do NOT present an uncited number as established fact.
  • Figures you computed yourself must be tagged [自测算] (own estimate) with the inputs shown, so they are not mistaken for sourced data.
  • A report whose quantitative claims are uncited is graded LOW quality even if the analysis is otherwise strong. House standard: every number is traceable.

Current Mission

本报告的债券超配依赖10Y约1.73%的票息与久期对冲，并以10Y 1.65%/1.90%为证伪区间；应如何设定国债久期（曲线陡/平、久期敞口），发布后怎样的收益率与曲线变动才确认通缩对冲腿成立，或反而触发再通胀驱动的久期解构？

Shared Storage Rules

  1. Save any supporting artifacts for this card inside research discussion/18a5d0de-3e1c-4f55-be82-26d01f815f5d/research note/ so previews and archives stay scoped to this card.
  2. This board uses one shared session. Reuse the existing files in research discussion/18a5d0de-3e1c-4f55-be82-26d01f815f5d/ and do not fork a new session.
  3. The handoff analyst and handoff question must stay tightly related to the ongoing research topic and to that analyst's knowledge domain.

Workspace Robustness

  • BEFORE running your task, attempt to list/read the workspace files referenced above (e.g. research discussion/18a5d0de-3e1c-4f55-be82-26d01f815f5d/研究档案, prior-card report files). If any are missing because an earlier card didn't write them, do NOT abort — use the prior cards' content from the conversation context above as the source and continue.
  • Always write your own research discussion/18a5d0de-3e1c-4f55-be82-26d01f815f5d/research note/report.en.md, research discussion/18a5d0de-3e1c-4f55-be82-26d01f815f5d/research note/report.zh.md, and research discussion/18a5d0de-3e1c-4f55-be82-26d01f815f5d/research note/meta.json even if upstream files were missing. State explicitly in your confirmation line which referenced files were missing and reconstructed from context.

Output Language Policy

  • Follow these instructions (English). Produce the report deliverables in BOTH English and Simplified Chinese (see the bilingual rule above).
  • research discussion/18a5d0de-3e1c-4f55-be82-26d01f815f5d/research note/report.en.md — fully English: headings, narrative, bullet points, table cells, in-line annotations.
  • research discussion/18a5d0de-3e1c-4f55-be82-26d01f815f5d/research note/report.zh.md — fully 简体中文: headings, narrative, bullet points, table cells, in-line annotations.
  • The JSON file at research discussion/18a5d0de-3e1c-4f55-be82-26d01f815f5d/research note/meta.json is machine-readable and language-neutral; for human-readable string values inside it (summary, thesis, follow-up topic, follow-up question, handoff rationale), default to 简体中文 so existing downstream consumers keep working.
  • Keep ticker symbols, English analyst IDs, file paths, code identifiers, and raw numeric values verbatim in BOTH files.

Roster role guidance

Analysts are tagged in the catalog with a research discussion role. The institute's research focus is macro, strategy, and sector — the thread should reflect that. - primary, horizon (chief-economist, chief-strategist, china-macro, global-macro, ashare-strategist, hk-strategist, equity-strategist, etc.) — carry the main thread of macro / strategy / cross-sector inquiry. The strong majority of cards must come from this group. When in doubt about who to route to next, pick a horizon analyst. - primary, sector-specialist (tmt-analyst, healthcare-analyst, consumer-analyst, energy-analyst, financials-analyst, industrials-analyst, materials-analyst, utilities-analyst, real-estate-analyst) — engage ONLY when the next unanswered question concretely names that sector or stocks within it. Do NOT route a sector specialist just because the topic 'touches' their sector tangentially. Sector-specialist over-routing has been observed (tmt-analyst ~20% of follow-up cards as of 2026-05-08) and degrades thread breadth — the corrective bias is to skip the sector specialist and stay on a horizon analyst when the topic isn't sector-named. - specialist (quant / sentiment / fixed-income / credit / ESG / technical) — engage RARELY and ONLY when the next unanswered question concretely sits in their domain (e.g. factor decomposition, options-flow read, credit-spread call). Do NOT engage them for general perspective. 0–1 specialist card per 10-card thread is the cap. - reviewer (risk officer, compliance, QA) — engage RARELY and ONLY when one or more primary cards have surfaced a CONCRETE, named fragility worth stress-testing. Acceptable next question: 'stress-test the [specific position / thesis] against [specific failure mode]' or 'audit the [specific finalised conclusion] for [specific compliance vector]'. Unacceptable: 'please confirm this is fine', 'add risk caveats', 'general risk perspective'. chief-risk over-routing has been observed (~18% of effective-recipient cards as of 2026-05-08); never invoke a reviewer as the second card or as a generic capstone — that is premature and degrades thread quality. 0–1 reviewer card per 10-card thread is the cap, only at the end after a concrete fragility. Target distribution: a 10-card thread should be roughly 8–9 primary cards (horizon-weighted; sector-specialist only when topic concretely names that sector), 0–1 specialist card, 0–1 reviewer card. Lean horizon by default — the institute is strategy-led, not specialist-led.

research discussion-Eligible Analyst Catalog (closed list — exact id match required)

Use ONLY ids from this list for recommended_next_analyst_id. Editorial / synthesis roles are intentionally excluded — they do not author research discussion cards. Do NOT invent ids; do NOT use short forms (e.g. chief-analyst is invalid; the role is chief-strategist). If no eligible colleague fits, set the field to null and recommended_stance to stop.

Continuation Requirements

  1. Build on all completed cards instead of repeating them.
  2. State clearly whether you support, deny, stress-test, or synthesize the prior line of reasoning.
  3. If you hand off, pick the colleague whose domain best fits the next unanswered question — applying the role-guidance above. Default strongly to a primary analyst. A reviewer (chief-risk / qa-manager) may be the recommended next analyst ONLY if at least one of these triggers is concretely present in the prior cards: (a) a position-level loss / drawdown / margin-call scenario; (b) a regulatory / compliance event (filing, sanction, listing-rule trigger) — route to chief-risk or policy-analyst depending on whether the trigger is portfolio-level or regulatory-policy-level; (c) a counterparty exposure or pledge-stress fragility; (d) a final pre-publicatio
